hero.heading: I build systems that last.
hero.subheading: Non-linear path: neuroscience → kitchens → 42 Lausanne → full-stack at Resilio. I care about what happens under the surface.

about.heading: A path,
about.description: Scroll through the river. Each waypoint is a chapter: jobs, projects, pivots. The stroke fills as you go.

resilio.title: Resilio
resilio.summary: Full-stack + infra on ResilioTech (LCA) and ResilioDatabase. Reduced dashboard load from 15s → <600ms. Replaced Cypress with Playwright, cut E2E 1h → 15m.

voltaire.title: Voltaire
voltaire.summary: AI writing assistant with agentic architecture. 2w POC → 2mo MVP → paid product with hundreds of users. Posthog feedback loop.

resilioJoined.title: Resilio · joined
resilioJoined.summary: Stepped in as primary architect on two products. Led Enterprise SSO integration with large-scale clients.

ecole42.title: École 42 Lausanne
ecole42.summary: Peer-to-peer, project-based curriculum in C / C++. minishell, containers, system design from first principles. Completed fast.

kitchens.title: Kitchens
kitchens.summary: Not a detour: a formative chapter. Service discipline, pressure handling, and an obsession with quality that I brought back into engineering.

neuroscience.title: Bachelor, Neuroscience
neuroscience.summary: Graduated at 19. Taught me how to read a system I did not design. Curiosity about the machinery beneath behavior.

contact.heading: Let's make something
contact.subheading: Open to opportunities where system architecture actually matters. Fastest reply via email.
